# CookingCalcs

> CookingCalcs is a free collection of cooking calculators and kitchen tools for home cooks. Every tool is designed to answer one question fast — no sign-up required, no paywalls.

CookingCalcs covers unit conversion, recipe scaling, cooking times and temperatures, and meal cost calculation. All tools run in the browser with no data collection.

## Tools

- [Cups to Grams Calculator](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/cups-to-grams.html): Convert cups to grams for flour, sugar, butter, rice, and 50+ ingredients. Accounts for ingredient density.
- [Oven Temperature Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/oven-temp-converter.html): Convert oven temperatures between Fahrenheit, Celsius, and Gas Mark instantly. Includes a full conversion chart.
- [Tablespoon to Teaspoon Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/tablespoon-to-teaspoon.html): Convert tablespoons to teaspoons and vice versa. Includes ml, cups, and ounce conversions.
- [Weight Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/weight-converter.html): Convert between grams, ounces, pounds, and kilograms instantly.
- [Recipe Multiplier](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/recipe-multiplier.html): Scale any recipe up or down by entering original and target serving counts.
- [Cooking Time Calculator](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/cooking-time-calculator.html): Calculate cooking times for chicken, beef, pork, lamb, and vegetables by weight, cut, and method.
- [Meat Temperature Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/meat-temperature-guide.html): Safe internal cooking temperatures for all meat types. USDA-recommended temps in °F and °C.
- [Meal Cost Calculator](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/meal-cost-calculator.html): Calculate total meal cost and cost per serving by adding ingredients and their prices.
- [Cost Per Serving Calculator](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/cost-per-serving.html): Find the cost per serving of any recipe or packaged food by entering total cost and servings.
- [Egg Size Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/egg-converter.html): Convert between egg sizes (small, medium, large, extra large, jumbo) for any recipe with exact counts and baking adjustment tips.
- [Liquid Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/liquid-converter.html): Convert between milliliters, cups, fluid ounces, tablespoons, and teaspoons instantly. Includes a full reference chart.
- [Weekly Meal Prep Cost Calculator](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/weekly-meal-prep-cost-calculator.html): Calculate your total weekly meal prep cost across all meals. Add each meal's cost and frequency to get weekly, daily, and monthly totals.
- [Slow Cooker Time Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/slow-cooker-converter.html): Convert oven or stovetop cooking times to slow cooker Low/High settings, or slow cooker times back to the oven. Includes a full reference chart and liquid adjustment guidance.

## Guides

- [The Complete Meal Prep & Grocery Budget Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/guides/complete-meal-prep-budget-guide.html): A single reference pulling together every cost-per-serving benchmark, weekly budget formula, and grocery-saving tactic on the site, with links to the exact calculator or article behind each number.
- [The Complete Meat Cooking & Temperature Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/guides/complete-meat-cooking-temperature-guide.html): Every safe internal temperature, cook time chart, and doneness troubleshooting tip on the site, organized by protein, with links to the exact calculator or article behind each number.
- [The Complete Baking Measurement & Conversion Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/guides/complete-baking-conversion-guide.html): Every cups-to-grams table, tablespoon-to-teaspoon chart, oven temperature, egg size, and butter conversion on the site, organized in one reference.
- [The Complete Recipe Scaling & Serving Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/guides/complete-recipe-scaling-guide.html): Everything about scaling a recipe up or down, halving, converting to metric, and figuring out real serving sizes, organized in one reference.

## Blog

- [The Complete Cups to Grams Conversion Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/cups-to-grams-guide.html): Full reference chart for converting cups to grams for flour, sugar, butter, and more.
- [Why You Should Weigh Ingredients When Baking](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/why-weigh-ingredients-baking.html): Why grams beat cups for baking accuracy and consistency.
- [Oven Temperature Conversion Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/oven-temperature-conversion-guide.html): Reference guide for Fahrenheit, Celsius, and Gas Mark with common baking temperatures.
- [How to Scale a Recipe Up or Down](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-scale-a-recipe.html): Guide to scaling recipes with tips for baking, cooking times, and pan sizes.
- [Common Baking Measurement Mistakes](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/baking-measurement-mistakes.html): The most common measurement errors that ruin baked goods and how to avoid them.
- [Safe Internal Meat Temperatures: Complete Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/meat-internal-temperature-guide.html): Safe cooking temperatures for beef, chicken, pork, fish, and more.
- [How to Cut Your Grocery Bill Without Eating Less](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-cut-grocery-bill.html): Practical strategies to reduce grocery spending without sacrificing meal quality.
- [Tablespoons to Teaspoons: Full Conversion Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/tablespoon-to-teaspoon-guide.html): Complete conversion guide for tablespoons, teaspoons, cups, and fluid ounces.
- [How to Calculate Cost Per Serving for Any Meal](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-calculate-cost-per-serving.html): Step-by-step guide to calculating the exact cost per serving of home-cooked meals.
- [Average Cost of a Home-Cooked Meal](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/average-cost-of-a-home-cooked-meal.html): Real US cost benchmarks for home-cooked meals by meal type and budget level, plus how to calculate your own instead of relying on a national average.
- [How Long to Cook Chicken Breast at Every Temperature](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-chicken-breast.html): Exact cook times for chicken breast at 350°F, 375°F, 400°F, 425°F across all methods.
- [Complete Cooking Measurement Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/cooking-measurement-guide.html): Full reference for cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, ounces, and metric conversions.
- [Meat Cooking Temperatures Explained](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/meat-cooking-temperatures-explained.html): Clear guide to safe cooking temperatures for all cuts with USDA guidelines.
- [How to Meal Prep on a Budget](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-meal-prep-on-a-budget.html): Tips for meal prepping on a tight budget with cost per serving guidance.
- [How to Reduce a Recipe to Fewer Servings](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-reduce-a-recipe.html): Step-by-step guide to scaling down recipes for 1 or 2 people.
- [How Many Cups in a Pound of Flour?](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-many-cups-in-a-pound-of-flour.html): Exact cup counts for all-purpose, bread, cake, and whole wheat flour by pound.
- [How to Measure Butter: Sticks, Cups, Tablespoons, and Grams](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-measure-butter.html): Full conversion chart for butter across all common units.
- [How Long to Cook Salmon](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-salmon.html): Cook times for salmon by method — oven, pan, air fryer, and poached — with internal temperature guidance.
- [How Many Grams in a Cup of Rice?](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-many-grams-in-a-cup-of-rice.html): Exact gram weights for white, brown, basmati, jasmine, and sushi rice — dry and cooked.
- [How Long to Cook Shrimp](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-shrimp.html): Exact cook times for shrimp by method and size — boiled, sautéed, baked, and grilled.
- [How to Calculate Meal Prep Cost for a Week](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-calculate-meal-prep-cost-for-a-week.html): Step-by-step guide to calculating weekly meal prep cost with a cost per serving formula.
- [10 Grocery Budget Tips That Actually Work](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/grocery-budget-tips.html): Practical strategies to cut your grocery bill without eating badly.
- [Tablespoon vs Teaspoon: What's the Difference?](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/tablespoon-vs-teaspoon.html): Clear answers plus a full conversion chart for tablespoons and teaspoons.
- [How to Substitute Egg Sizes in Recipes](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-substitute-egg-sizes.html): How to swap medium, large, extra-large, and jumbo eggs in any recipe with a conversion chart, including UK vs US egg size differences.
- [How Long to Cook Ground Beef](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-ground-beef.html): Exact cook times for ground beef on the stovetop, oven, and air fryer with safety temperatures.
- [What Is a Serving Size? A Practical Guide](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/what-is-a-serving-size.html): What serving size means, reference amounts by food category, and how it affects cost per serving.
- [Butter Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/butter-converter.html): Convert butter between sticks, cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, grams, and ounces instantly.
- [How Many Eggs in a Cup?](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-many-eggs-in-a-cup.html): Exact egg counts per cup by size for whole eggs, whites, and yolks — with volume measurement guide.
- [How to Cut a Recipe in Half](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-reduce-a-recipe-by-half.html): Complete halving guide with chart for every measurement, plus eggs, leavening, and pan size adjustments.
- [How Long to Cook Pork Chops](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-pork-chops.html): Exact cook times by thickness and method — oven, pan, air fryer, grill — with internal temperature guidance.
- [Baking Substitutions Calculator](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/baking-substitutions.html): Find exact substitutes for butter, eggs, milk, buttermilk, baking powder, and more with precise amounts.
- [How Many Grams in a Cup of Sugar?](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-many-grams-in-a-cup-of-sugar.html): Exact gram weights for granulated, brown, powdered, and coconut sugar with full conversion tables.
- [How Long to Cook Bacon](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-bacon.html): Exact cook times for bacon by method and thickness — oven, stovetop, and air fryer — with doneness guide.
- [How Long to Cook Steak](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-steak.html): Steak cook times by thickness and doneness — pan-sear, grill, and oven — with internal temperature guide.
- [How Many Grams in a Cup of Oats?](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-many-grams-in-a-cup-of-oats.html): Exact gram weights for rolled, quick, steel-cut, and instant oats — dry and cooked — with full conversion table.
- [How Many Cups in a Pound of Sugar?](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-many-cups-in-a-pound-of-sugar.html): Cup counts per pound for granulated, brown, powdered, and coconut sugar with a full conversion table.
- [How Long to Cook Lamb Chops](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-lamb-chops.html): Exact lamb chop cook times by method and doneness — pan-sear, oven, grill, and air fryer — with internal temperature guide.
- [Cups to Tablespoons Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/cups-to-tablespoons.html): Convert cups to tablespoons, teaspoons, and milliliters instantly. 1 cup = 16 tablespoons.
- [Raw to Cooked Weight Converter](https://cookingcalcs.com/tools/raw-to-cooked-weight.html): Convert raw meat, rice, and pasta weight to cooked weight (or back). Accounts for shrinkage and water absorption by food type.
- [How Long to Cook Turkey Breast](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-turkey-breast.html): Turkey breast cook times by weight, bone-in or boneless, oven and air fryer, with internal temperature guide.
- [How Many Cups in a Quart, Pint, and Gallon?](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-many-cups-in-a-quart-pint-gallon.html): Complete US liquid measurement conversion table — 1 quart = 4 cups, 1 pint = 2 cups, 1 gallon = 16 cups.
- [How to Convert a Recipe to Metric](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-convert-a-recipe-to-metric.html): Step-by-step guide to converting US recipes to metric — cups to grams, Fahrenheit to Celsius, pan sizes.
- [How Long to Cook Chicken Thighs](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-to-cook-chicken-thighs.html): Exact cook times for chicken thighs by method — oven, pan, air fryer, and grill — bone-in and boneless.
- [How to Calculate Cooking Time for Meat](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-to-calculate-cooking-time.html): The formula for calculating cooking time by weight, cut, and method, plus why time alone isn't enough.
- [Is Your Oven Running Hot or Cold? How to Test It](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/is-your-oven-running-hot-or-cold.html): Most home ovens are 25-50°F off their dial setting. How to test with a thermometer or a sugar test, and what to do once you know the offset.
- [How Long Can Food Sit Out? The 2-Hour Rule Explained](https://cookingcalcs.com/blog/how-long-can-food-sit-out.html): The USDA 2-hour rule, the 1-hour hot-weather exception, and what happens in the food safety danger zone.
